channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Empty Boxes pile at Chaumert Road Peckham Rye Lane., 21st March
item.description:
Shopkeepers throw empty fruits and vegetables boxes at Chaumert Road Near KK Butchers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Choumert Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By BT box on Claremont road junction with Kilburn lane, 21st March
item.description:
Dumped wood

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Broken glass over pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Lots of small shards all over the corner for a good few days now. Dangerous for animals and children walking to school
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus time table, 21st March
item.description:
Sanford street Remove graffiti from bus time table

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sanford Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70-72, Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 21st March
item.description:
Sanford Street by Chubworthy Street Remove graffiti from Bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sanford Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Inappropriate graffiti on path, 21st March
item.description:
Inappropriate graffiti on path. What3words ///vision.quiet.mime Coordinates (51.5005999, 0.1155844)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastern Way, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped carpet on road verge nr 140 and Xmas tree nr 130, 21st March
item.description:
Rolled up carpet has been there some while - Xmas tree has been there since January.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowview Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three big holes due to missing drain cover, 21st March
item.description:
It is dangerous for pedestrians as you can put your while foot in the holes, and there is more than one in a very busy pavement during weekends when you can’t even see the floor in front of you. You can even fall on the road where traffic is busy too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Church Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken padlock, 21st March
item.description:
Someone has prised and broken the padlock on the secure gate to the Craydene Open Space A resident has place a small bike lock on it so the gate looks secure we are worried that cars will drive onto the field or caravans might set up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Craydene Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned traffic management kit, 21st March
item.description:
Trench cover. Cones. Footpath closed signage. Road works warning triangle. Unmarked. No works here for several months. .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Crescent, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Fly tipping large amounts of clothing, 21st March
item.description:
Fly tipping large amounts of clothing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince George Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 21st March
item.description:
This is persistent offender. It's obviously a large dog. This is the latest of many deposits from this dog/owner. It would appear to be this is their regular route. No photo; it's dog mess.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Corelli Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 21st March
item.description:
1-27 Manor Grovve. Please clear flytip on footpath end of block

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human waste, 21st March
item.description:
Human waste as entrance to car park. It only just got cleaned a few days ago and someone does it again. The smell is bad.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newington Butts, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 21st March
item.description:
Since this new bin was installed, it seems not to have been emptied. As a result, it is now overflowing and there is rubbish spilling down the street. We did not have such a serious litter problem when there was no bin! Please can it be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. John's Vale, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped door, 21st March
item.description:
Dumped door

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bredhurst Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foulinb, 21st March
item.description:
Outside no 2 Kentmere House. Please clear fouling from footpath outside no 3. Thus may be human fouling

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ilderton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped wc, 21st March
item.description:
Been there ages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crampton Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bin bags full of rubbish (?) Left on corner if Cliff Terrace and St John's Vale., 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish bags left on corner of street. Is someone supposed to collect them?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Cliff Terrace, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
